name: Yara AI
description: Yara AI's founders voluntarily shut down their mental health chatbot in November 2025, concluding that AI was too dangerous for vulnerable users with serious mental health issues.
story: Yara AI launched in 2024 as an AI therapy companion, but unlike most startup failures, its shutdown was voluntary. In November 2025, co-founder made the difficult decision to pull the plug after concluding that 'the moment someone truly vulnerable reaches out, AI becomes dangerous.' Illinois regulations made it clear that wellness labels weren't sufficient to avoid liability for AI providing mental health support. Rather than pivot to a safer use case, the founders chose to shut down entirely and open-sourced their guardrail technology so others could learn from their safety work. It was a rare act of ethical self-regulation in the AI startup world.

sources.title: Yara AI founder shuts down therapy app
